sourceSummary.oneLine: BLUE_FOOT_WASHER part approval sheet for part number MKK-000109, supplied by ㈜동남엔지니어링 to ㈜H&abyz.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports part approval documentation, material listing, QC process control, and product inspection criteria for the listed G1417 and G1717 models.
keyPoints: Product name is BLUE FOOT WASHER / BLUE_FOOT_WASHER and part number is MKK-000109.
Applicable models are G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
Revision history records Rev. 0 on 2025.04.17 as 최초 제정.
Raw material list identifies AL6061 for 제품 외관.
QC process covers incoming inspection, machining, washing, buffing, final inspection, and packaging.

concepts.name: Non-use Certificate for Restricted Substances
concepts.evidence: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The document is an approval sheet for BLUE FOOT WASHER.
evidence.evidenceText: 승 인 원 [Approval Sheet]; 제품명(PRODUCT NAME), BLUE FOOT WASHER

evidence.claim: The revision history records initial establishment at Rev. 0 on 4/17/25.
Applicable models are G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP, G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, and G1717FWP.
evidence.evidenceText: 적용 모델(MODEL NO) : G1417CW, G1417FW, G1417CWP, G1417FWP G1717CW, G1717FW, G1717CWP, G1717FWP

evidence.claim: The raw material listed for the product exterior is AL6061.
The material list includes a non-use certificate column for Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, and PBDE.
evidence.evidenceText: 비사용 증명서 (Cd, Pb, Hg, Cr6+, PBB, PBDE)

evidence.claim: The QC process status is mass production.
Incoming inspection checks appearance for no cracks, bubbles, foreign matter, or corrosion.
evidence.evidenceText: 수입검사, 원자재, 육안, 외관, 크랙, 기포, 이물질, 부식 없을 것

evidence.claim: Machining CTQ dimensions include Φ11 ±0.05, Φ6.4 ±0.05, and 2 ±0.05.
Final inspection checks appearance and CTQ dimensions.
evidence.evidenceText: 출하검사, 육안, 외관, 찍힘, 긁힘, 휨, 버 없을 것; V/C, CTQ, 치수 1, Φ11 ±0.05

evidence.claim: Product inspection criteria define one product as one inspection unit.
Appearance inspection is full inspection and dimensional inspection is 3 EA per lot.
evidence.evidenceText: 외관, 전수 검사; 치수, 3 EA / LOT

evidence.claim: Accepted lots are stamped as accepted during packaging.
evidence.evidenceText: 합격 처리된 LOT는 포장시 합격 도장을 날인하여 포장한다.

evidence.claim: Rejected lots follow the internal nonconforming product handling procedure.
evidence.evidenceText: 불합격 LOT 처리; 자체 부적합품 처리 절차에 따른다.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text; authoritySignal is general.
Document uses both Rev. 00 on the approval cover and Rev.0/0 in revision history and QC process tables.
External regulatory standard names are not stated; listed standards are internal inspection, process, calibration, shipment, work instruction, and packaging documents.
Source text appears extracted from a spreadsheet with many empty cells and line breaks; key fields remain readable.
